description_long: This is an ornate chandelier with a central column composed of faceted, crystal-like segments that reflect light. It features two concentric rings of curved arms, each arm supporting a candle-shaped bulb holder, giving the appearance of traditional candelabra lighting. The arms are adorned with hanging crystal pendants that add to the lamp's luxurious and decorative appeal. The top of the chandelier is attached to a detailed, textured stem that would connect to a ceiling mount. The overall design is symmetrical, with each arm and bulb evenly spaced around the central axis. The transparent and reflective materials used throughout the structure enhance its elegance and make it a striking centerpiece for upscale urban interiors.
description: An elegant crystal chandelier with multiple candle-style bulbs, curved arms, and hanging crystal pendants, designed for ceiling mounting. Its transparent, faceted surfaces and ornate details create a luxurious, eye-catching appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of arms and bulbs, with the central column and crystal pendants clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the curvature of the arms and the layered arrangement of the bulbs and pendants.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the depth of the chandelier, the even spacing of the arms, and the vertical alignment of the central column.
description_view_3: Rear angled view similar to the front, highlighting the uniformity of the design and the distribution of decorative elements.
